# everything in the mirror world is rotated 90 degrees clockwise

# the other way slices

We go | | | | | here
They go   ==========
 .               ==========
~ ~ ~ wiggle wiggle wiggle they are us coming up

```
positional directional map

"POSI"      "ALGI"        p AGL.         NON-ROT. KEY
b  ^  d     3  6  9          W           7  8  9
<  o  >     2  5  8       S  *  N        4  5  6
p  v  q     1  4  7          E           1  2  3

GROUP CHANGERS    3=7 6=8 2=4 SWAP ANGLES
BOUNDARY REMAINS  1 5 9 ACROSS

3 → 6 → 9
↓
2 → 5 → 8
↓
1 → 4 → 7

3 <  > 6 <  > 9
^ b  d ^ b  d ^
v p  q v p  q v
2 <  > 5 <  > 8
^ b  d ^ b  d ^
v p  q v p  q v  
1 <  > 4 <  > 7

wolfies version
3 < > 6 < > 9
^ b d ^ b d ^
p v q v p q v
2 < > 5 < > 8
^ b d ^ b d ^
p v q v p q v
1 < > 4 < > 7

snakes
3 → 6 → 9
2 → 5 → 8    =
1 → 4 → 7

3 → 6 → 9
        ↓
8 ← 5 ← 2    2
↓
1 → 4 → 7

3 → 6 → 9
↓
2 → 5 → 8   E
↓
1 → 4 → 7


3 3 3
3 3 3
3 3 3

   3
0 4 5           weird fibbi block
3 1 2 5
   1 3 8 

6 6 6 6 6 6   3 3 3 6 6 6   

8 
3 is its depth like B but 
9 6 yin/yang 

 W W               W       M
  W   each petal  W W     M M
  M               M M     W W
 M M               M       W    
```


**Key Principles of Quantum Mechanics:**

- **[Wave-Particle Duality](https://www.google.com/search?q=Wave-Particle+Duality&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEAk):** Particles, such as electrons, exhibit characteristics of both waves and particles.
- **[Quantization](https://www.google.com/search?q=Quantization&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEAs):** Energy and other properties are not continuous but come in discrete, "quantized" units (quanta).
- **[Superposition](https://www.google.com/search?q=Superposition&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEA0):** A quantum system can exist in multiple states or configurations simultaneously, described by a wave function.
- **[Probability and Measurement](https://www.google.com/search?q=Probability+and+Measurement&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEA8):** The outcome of a measurement is not deterministic but probabilistic; the wave function, governed by the Schrödinger equation, calculates the likelihood of finding a particle in a certain state.
- **[Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle](https://www.google.com/search?q=Heisenberg+Uncertainty+Principle&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEBE):** It is impossible to know both the exact position and momentum of a particle simultaneously.
- **[Quantum Entanglement](https://www.google.com/search?q=Quantum+Entanglement&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEBM):** Two or more particles can become connected such that the quantum state of one cannot be described independently of the others, regardless of the distance separating them.
- **[Wave Function Collapse](https://www.google.com/search?q=Wave+Function+Collapse&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEBU):** Observation or measurement causes the superposition to "collapse" into a single, definite state.
- **[Pauli Exclusion Principle](https://www.google.com/search?q=Pauli+Exclusion+Principle&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEBc):** In an atom, no two electrons can have the exact same set of quantum numbers.
- **[Tunneling](https://www.google.com/search?q=Tunneling&client=firefox-b-1-lm&hs=hUWp&sca_esv=e0a8504cdddaab2b&biw=1488&bih=833&sxsrf=ANbL-n4XBY2wmobdK9qaxhanqsjz78bghg%3A1773543510337&ei=ViC2afOjFJCsw8cPsbGkoAM&oq=core+principles+of+quantum+mech&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAPXEJXHtXbfrHC7LjSyfZPlP6wiKlLGiIVa618Ng6__ltxMc-e4RmnC81Px8R5gyPU4K_-1aRzRA33v1PXD4bi9shWFmMsLH2IGhNlmKOvgPQiCDVscJ8ZI2LqpaZhOEY&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwjE-ozN9KCTAxWCKFkFHcitK0cQgK4QegYIAQgBEBk):** Particles have a non-zero probability of passing through energy barriers that classical physics would deem insurmountable.

Core Principles of Physics:

Newton's Laws of Motion:
        First Law (Inertia): Objects remain at rest or move at a constant velocity unless acted upon by a net external force.
        Second Law (

    ): Acceleration is proportional to the net force applied and inversely proportional to mass.
    Third Law (Action-Reaction): For every action, there is an equal and opposite reaction.

Conservation Laws:

    Conservation of Energy: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed (e.g., potential to kinetic).
    Conservation of Momentum: Total momentum in a closed system remains constant.

Fundamental Forces and Gravity:

    Universal Gravitation: All masses attract each other, with force depending on mass and the inverse square of distance.
    Electromagnetism: Governs electric charges, magnetic fields, and light, often described by Maxwell's equations.

Thermodynamics:

    Laws of Thermodynamics: Govern heat, energy transfer, and entropy, defining how energy changes form in systems.

Modern Physics Principles:

    Relativity: Einstein's theories describe physics at high speeds and large scales (gravity as space-time curvature).

## AI can mimic some of those signals of connection, but it **doesn't live a life**.

if a thing has more mass it moves faster (gravitation forces)
what goes up must come down (pull force)

| `o` | contract  |     |     | #prime | 1   |
| --- | --------- | --- | --- | ------ | --- |
| `O` | expansion |     |     | #prime | 1   |
|     |           |     |     |        |     |

nums#  -- -1 -2 -3 -4 -5 -6 -7 -8 -9 -0  10base
       -- -1 -1 -2 -3 -5 -8 13 21 34 45  fibinacci
       -- -3 -6 -9 12 15 18 21 24 27 30  3base
